summary: Ship gate can proceed for the narrowed r2 scope. P-1 through P-4 are addressed in the design doc: production currency migration is explicit and idempotent, zero-activity caller net is specified as signed "0", HUF=0 is recorded as a deliberate product decision with warning, and per-slice test seams are named. No new critical issue found; no materially simpler alternative surfaced within this re-review scope.
